channel.title: SentryInsight Threat Actor Briefing
channel.description: Daily cybersecurity threat actor intelligence briefings powered by SentryInsight. Stay informed about the latest threat groups, campaigns, and adversary activities.
channel.itunes:author: SentryInsight
channel.itunes:summary: Automated threat actor intelligence briefings from SentryInsight.

item.title: Threat Actor Briefing — 2026-03-20
item.description: - **APT28 (Russian GRU)**: Exploiting Zimbra vulnerabilities in attacks against Ukrainian government systems - **Interlock Ransomware Gang**: Actively exploiting Cisco FMC zero-day since January 2026 for ransomware deployment - **Lazarus Group (North Korean)**: Attributed to Bitrefill cryptocurrency platform attack - **Bluenoroff Group**: Subgroup of Lazarus involved in financial cybercrime operations - **Handala Hacktivist Group**: Conducted destructive cyberattack on Stryker medical technology

item.title: Threat Actor Briefing — 2026-03-18
item.description: - **Interlock Ransomware Gang**: Actively exploiting Cisco FMC vulnerability since January, demonstrating sophisticated zero-day attack capabilities - **SideWinder Espionage Group**: Suspected India-linked threat group expanding operations across Southeast Asia, targeting governments, telecom, and critical infrastructure - **GlassWorm Campaign**: Coordinated supply chain attack targeting hundreds of development platforms and repositories - **Warlock Ransomware Group**: Enhanced post-exploitation
